languages.text: "Ты готовился пятьдесят лет и хочешь сдаться сейчас? Разве ты не великий генетор? Спаси его!"
"You have been working toward this for fifty years and you want to give up now? Are you or are you not a great Genetor? Save him!"
languages.original_text: "Ты готовился пятьдесят лет и хочешь сдаться сейчас? Разве ты не великий генетор? Спаси его!"

traits.locale_text: "You have been working toward this for fifty years and you want to give up now? Are you or are you not a great Genetor? Save him!"
"You have been working toward this for fifty years and you want to give up now? Are you or are you not a great Genetor? Save him!"
"You have been working toward this for fifty years and you want to give up now? Are you or are you not a great Genetor? Save him!"

languages.text: «¿Cincuenta años trabajando para esto, y ahora pretende rendirse sin más? ¿No es usted uno de los más ilustres genetores? ¡Sálvelo!».
languages.original_text: "You have been working toward this for fifty years and you want to give up now? Are you or are you not a great Genetor? Save him!"

traits.locale_text: «¿Cincuenta años trabajando para esto, y ahora pretende rendirse sin más? ¿No es usted uno de los más ilustres genetores? ¡Sálvelo!».

languages.text: “你为此努力了五十年，现在却要放弃？你不是伟大的基因士吗？去救他啊！”
languages.original_text: "You have been working toward this for fifty years and you want to give up now? Are you or are you not a great Genetor? Save him!"

traits.locale_text: “你为此努力了五十年，现在却要放弃？你不是伟大的基因士吗？去救他啊！”

languages.text: « Allez-vous vraiment baisser les bras maintenant, après avoir œuvré dans ce but pendant cinquante ans ? N'êtes-vous pas un éminent genetor ? Sauvez-le ! »
languages.original_text: "You have been working toward this for fifty years and you want to give up now? Are you or are you not a great Genetor? Save him!"

traits.locale_text: « Allez-vous vraiment baisser les bras maintenant, après avoir œuvré dans ce but pendant cinquante ans ? N'êtes-vous pas un éminent genetor ? Sauvez-le ! »

languages.text: "Elli yıldır bunun için çalışıyorsun, şimdi öylece pes edeceksin demek. Sen büyük bir Genetör müsün yoksa değil misin? Kurtar onu!"
languages.original_text: "You have been working toward this for fifty years and you want to give up now? Are you or are you not a great Genetor? Save him!"

traits.locale_text: "Elli yıldır bunun için çalışıyorsun, şimdi öylece pes edeceksin demek. Sen büyük bir Genetör müsün yoksa değil misin? Kurtar onu!"

languages.text: "Ihr habt fünfzig Jahre auf diesen Moment hingearbeitet und wollt jetzt aufgeben? Seid Ihr jetzt ein großer Genetor oder nicht?" Rettet ihn!"
languages.original_text: "You have been working toward this for fifty years and you want to give up now? Are you or are you not a great Genetor? Save him!"

traits.locale_text: "Ihr habt fünfzig Jahre auf diesen Moment hingearbeitet und wollt jetzt aufgeben? Seid Ihr jetzt ein großer Genetor oder nicht?" Rettet ihn!"

languages.text: 「君は五十年もこれを目指して取り組んできて、今になって諦めるというのか？ 君は偉大なゲネターなのか、そうでないのか？ 彼を救え！」
languages.original_text: "You have been working toward this for fifty years and you want to give up now? Are you or are you not a great Genetor? Save him!"

traits.locale_text: 「君は五十年もこれを目指して取り組んできて、今になって諦めるというのか？ 君は偉大なゲネターなのか、そうでないのか？ 彼を救え！」
